items.name_en: YSL Saint Laurent Shopping Bag. Truly have to admire how beautiful it really is. Chic girl/street style/ fashionista essential. New design with new fabric in a new matte deer skin texture. The feel and texture are super great. The stitching on this bag is neat and aligned, very classy. The capacity is sufficient and it has a zipper pocket inside! Whether matching with various outfits or attending various occasions, it's all ok. Come get one! Size 25-21-10
items.name_cn:
YSL Saint Laurent Shopping Bag. Truly have to admire how beautiful it really is. Chic girl/street style/ fashionista essential. New design with new fabric in a new matte deer skin texture. The feel and texture are super great. The stitching on this bag is neat and aligned, very classy. The capacity is sufficient and it has a zipper pocket inside! Whether matching with various outfits or attending various occasions, it's all ok. Come get one! Size 25-21-10
Code: 8151

items.name_en: 《Exclusive New Arrival》🆕🆕YSL Saint Laurent has released a hot item❗❗It has to be said that the (Saint Laurent) crossbody, handbag, chain bag is on fire in the fashion world. The toothpick strap can be used directly as a clutch, another hot item. Inside and out exudes a charming aura. The bag has 4 card slots and a front pocket. Paired with exquisite craftsmanship 😖. The quality is worth it. Model=26607 Dimensions 22x15.5x6cm

items.name_en: Exclusive New Arrival 🆕🆕 YSL Saint Laurent has released a bestseller ❗❗ The Saint Laurent shoulder bag, which is already very popular in the fashion world, can be used as a handbag with the crocodile leather strap. Model=26607, Size 22x15.5x6cm

items.name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕 High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥 Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining requires reverse stitching during production, so the leather quality is extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, this boutique piece is finally presented to everyone💪💪Size: 20cm

items.name_en: Saint Laurent Envelope Bag is freshly out!! Simply beautiful to the heart. High-end goods, original hardware logo, first choice imported leather, texture is super amazing 😍😍 It is said everyone needs one, this style must be kept. Classic shape! It really catches the eye. Beauty, hurry up and grab it. The real thing is just too beautiful 💕 Size 23 15, Item No. 377828
